1.instruction:
Perform a comprehensive code review of the Jasmin SMPP dashboard, fix all remaining errors, and prepare production-ready code. This includes:
1. Review and fix all React components
2. Ensure proper error handling
3. Implement proper authentication flow
4. Add loading states
5. Optimize performance
6. Add proper documentation
7. Set up proper environment configurations
8. Implement proper logging
Deliver the final production-ready code with deployment instructions.

2.instruction:
Create a GitHub repository and push the Jasmin SMPP dashboard code. Include:
1. Complete source code from /data/chats/015rz/workspace
2. README.md with setup and deployment instructions
3. .gitignore file
4. Environment configuration examples
5. Documentation for API endpoints and features
6. License file

3.instruction:
Push the Jasmin SMPP dashboard code to the GitHub repository at https://github.com/yunier850710/jasmin_sms_gateway. Steps:
1. Configure git remote
2. Push all code and documentation
3. Verify the push was successful
4. Provide confirmation when complete
